title: Standardize nil slice handling across Go services
description: Multiple Go service files (thesaurus, email/normalize, text/profanity, entertainment/emoji, email/disposable) all have the same pattern: check nil then allocate an empty slice. Standardize by removing the nil checks and returning nil directly — encoding/json marshals nil slices as null which is acceptable, or pre-allocate with make([]T, 0) at declaration.
